label: Polling NocoDB v2 (local) → UNS
info:
Sessie 4: Poll werkorders uit lokale NocoDB (self-hosted, API v2).

Vervang TABLE_ID_HIER met je tabel ID.
Vervang XC_TOKEN_HIER met je NocoDB API token.

API v2 response: { list: [ { order_nr, product, asset, qty, customer, priority, due_date, status } ] }

Status mapping: Nieuw → order.created, Bezig → order.progress, Klaar → order.closed

name: v2 → UMH payload
